what: Trends of numbers of active substances
title: Trends of data contained in XML dumps of the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products
text: figure shows number active substances contained products occurring Swiss Register Plant Protection Products years starting 2011. Unauthorized products active substance contained products filtered using function srppp_xml_product_use_no_authorized. categories based classification register. active substance can one category, therefore total number active numbers smaller sum active substances category.
code: years <- names(srppp_list) names(years) <- years actives_by_category <- sapply(years, function(year) {   sr <- srppp_list[[year]]   actives_categories <- sr$products |>     mutate(nonauth = srppp_xml_product_use_not_authorized(name, year, exhaustionDeadline)) |>     filter(!nonauth) |>      left_join(sr$categories, by = "pNbr", relationship = "many-to-many") |>     select(pNbr, category = category_de) |>     unique() |>     left_join(sr$ingredients, by = "pNbr", relationship = "many-to-many") |>     dplyr::filter(type == "ACTIVE_INGREDIENT") |>     left_join(sr$substances, by = "pk") |>     select(pk, category, substance_de) |>     unique() |>     arrange(pk, substance_de, category)    n_actives <- actives_categories |>     select(pk) |>     unique() |>     nrow()    actives_categories |>     group_by(category) |>     summarise(n = n()) |>     arrange(desc(n))    n_tibble <- actives_categories |>     mutate(category = case_when(       grepl("Herbizid", category) ~ "Herbicides",       grepl("Fungizid", category) ~ "Fungicides",       grepl("Insektizid", category) ~ "Insecticides",       grepl("Saatbeizmittel", category) ~ "Seed dressings",       grepl("Regulator", category) ~ "PGR",       grepl("Phytoregulator", category) ~ "PGR", # new in 2024       grepl("Lebende Organismen", category) ~ "Organisms",       grepl("Akarizid", category) ~ "Acaricides",       .default = "Others"     )) |>     group_by(category) |>     select(substance_de, category) |>      distinct() |>      summarise(n = n())    n <- n_tibble$n   names(n) <- n_tibble$category   n <- c(Total = n_actives, n)   n <- n[c(     "Acaricides",     "Fungicides",      "Herbicides",      "Insecticides",      "Organisms",      "PGR",      "Seed dressings",      "Others",      "Total"     )]   return(n) }) actives_by_category |>    kbl() actives_by_category_long <- actives_by_category |>   tibble::as_tibble(rownames = "Category") |>   tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = where(is.numeric), names_to = "Year", values_to = "Number") |>   ungroup() |>   group_by(Category)  actives_by_category_long |>   ggplot(aes(Year, Number, group = Category, color = Category)) +   geom_point() +   geom_line()

title: Historical Data from the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products as an R Package
text: Data objects extracted historical XML versions Swiss Register Plant Protection Products ‘SRPPP’. Starting 2011, one data object contained year. Note information contained project outdated. online version current register can accessed via https://www.psm.admin.ch/de/produkte. XML dump current register can read using companion package agroscope-ch/srppp. guarantee correspondence data contained read using package online version, original registration documents. Also, Federal Food Safety Veterinary Office, coordinating authorisation plant protection products Switzerland, answer requests regarding package.

what: Additional notes regarding proper use of the data
title: List of 'srppp_dm' objects for all years starting 2011 — srppp_list
text: include historical, current authorisation data package, please note following: descriptions products authorised uses contained package refer past authorisations. Regarding current authorisation, please refer Swiss Register Plant Protection Products, use srppp package facilitates reading current registration data R. Products whose authorisation expired withdrawn parallel import list present historical data end period use end user still permitted ('exhaustionDeadline'). date sell-period ('soldoutDeadline') indicated products table srppp_dm object. use historical registration data form provided package, please cite package described output citation("srppphist").

title: List of 'srppp_dm' objects for all years starting 2011 — srppp_list
code: names(srppp_list) #>  [1] "2011" "2012" "2013" "2014" "2015" "2016" "2017" "2018" "2019" "2020" #> [11] "2021" "2022" "2023" "2024" "2025" "2026"  # In case you are interested in the registered uses of products containing # a certain active substance, here is some example code library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE) # Step 1: Get the pk number of a certain active substance pk_active <- srppp_active_substances |>   filter(substance_de == "Cyproconazole") |>   pull(pk)  # Step 2: Get the products (pNbrs) containing that substance in 2018 products_2018 <- srppp_list[["2018"]]$ingredients |>   filter(pk == pk_active)  # Step 3: Get the associated uses uses_2018 <- products_2018 |>   left_join(srppp_list[["2018"]]$uses, by = "pNbr")  # Step 4: Add additional information, e.g. the cultures uses_x_cultures_2018 <- uses_2018 |>   left_join(srppp_list[["2018"]]$cultures, by = c("pNbr", "use_nr"))  # Step 5: Application rate in g/ha uses_x_cultures_2018_rate <- uses_x_cultures_2018 |>   srppp::application_rate_g_per_ha() |>   select(pNbr, use_nr, application_area_de, culture_de, rate_g_per_ha)  # If this should be repeated for all available years, it is convenient # to define a function that extracts the desired information, apply it # to the list of yearly product registers, and combine the results in a # table. uses_cultures_rates <- function(sr, pk_active) {   sr$ingredients |>     filter(pk == pk_active) |>     left_join(sr$uses, by = "pNbr") |>     left_join(sr$cultures, by = c("pNbr", "use_nr")) |>     srppp::application_rate_g_per_ha() |>     select(pNbr, use_nr, application_area_de,       culture_de, rate_g_per_ha) }  # Test the function uses_cultures_rates(srppp_list[["2018"]], 116L) #> # A tibble: 72 × 5 #>     pNbr use_nr application_area_de culture_de           rate_g_per_ha #>    <int>  <int> <chr>               <chr>                        <dbl> #>  1  6941      1 Feldbau             Gerste                          80 #>  2  6941      2 Feldbau             Triticale                       80 #>  3  6941      3 Feldbau             Zuckerrübe                      64 #>  4  6941      4 Feldbau             Winterroggen                    80 #>  5  6941      4 Feldbau             Triticale                       80 #>  6  6941      5 Feldbau             Weizen                          80 #>  7  6941      6 Gemüsebau           Rande                           64 #>  8  6941      7 Feldbau             Weizen                          80 #>  9  6941      8 Feldbau             Weizen                          80 #> 10  6941      9 Zierpflanzen        Zier- und Sportrasen            80 #> # what: Table resolving substance primary keys extracted from all years starting 2011 — srppp_substances
title: Table resolving substance primary keys extracted from all years starting 2011 — srppp_substances
text: table primary keys ('pk') active substances, resolving latest entry 'substances' tables srppp_list. primary key scheme XML files published registration authorities end 2025, substances table listed twice, old integer primary key, new primary key form UUID. primary key, earliest latest year occurrence given columns 'earliest' 'latest'. substance list without duplicates supplied srppp_substances_merged.

text: However, cases, comments amended product name show authorized. especially true year 2011, number products contain comments (Bew. suspendiert/Aut. suspendue/Aut. sospesa) (Bew. beendet/Aut. révoquée/Aut. revocata) comment detected, function returns TRUE. comments indicate authorisation use product clarified, [Bewilligung beendet: Wegen hängigem Gerichtsverfahren gilt einstweilen folgende Aufbrauchfrist: 31.05.2022. Verkauf ist einstweilen weiterhin möglich.] one cases, date exhaustion deadline comment later date publication, therefore function returns FALSE. specific case product Allegro (W-5479) year 2022, exhaustion deadline given comment publication register. However, case exhaustionDeadline dedicated field 31 August 2022, assumed use product authorized least part 2022. Comments indicating authorization renewal still process considered indicate use authorized time publication. Examples comments [Erneuerungsgesuch Bearbeitung] (demande de renouvellement en cours) comments frequently found registers published 2016 2017, also occur later years. Finally, register 2020 number products exhaustion date 31 December 2019 indicated comment, register 2022, two products exhaustion date 31 December 2021 indicated. cases, function returns TRUE.

what: srppphist: Historical Data from the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products as an R Package — srppphist-package
title: srppphist: Historical Data from the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products as an R Package — srppphist-package
text: Data objects extracted historical XML versions Swiss Register Plant Protection Products 'SRPPP'. Starting 2011, one data object contained year. Note information contained project outdated. online version current register can accessed via https://www.psm.admin.ch/de/produkte. XML dump current register can read using 'srppp' package. guarantee correspondence data contained read using package online version, original registration documents. Also, Federal Food Safety Veterinary Office, coordinating authorisation plant protection products Switzerland, answer requests regarding package.

title: srppphist: Historical Data from the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products as an R Package — srppphist-package
text: Maintainer: Johannes Ranke johannes.ranke@agroscope.admin.ch (ORCID) contributors: Daniel Baumgartner [contributor] Romualdus Kasteel romualdus.kasteel@agroscope.admin.ch [reviewer] Marcel Mathis marcel.mathis@agroscope.admin.ch [contributor, reviewer] Agroscope [copyright holder]

title: version 2.0.1
text: Remove duplicate entries srppp_substances_merged srppp_active_substances_merged.

title: version 2.0.0
text: Add data 2026 XML file dated 3 February 2026. new primary key scheme used substances 2026 data, lists srppp_substances srppp_active substances, resolving primary keys substance names now contain duplicated entries. Also, pk column now type character, can hold new type primary keys formatted UUID. tables, new versions without duplicates added, .e.  srppp_substances_merged srppp_active_substances_merged. tables, two primary key columns, one called pk_v1 containing integer primary keys previous format, pk_v2 containing primary keys current format, .e. form UUID. package now depends srppp v2.0.4, fixes problem occurred reading register 2015 srppp versions 2.0.0 2.0.3.

title: version 1.0.0.9005
text: Add vignette showing cases products registered name contain different set active ingredients. srppp_products, srppp_substances similar objects: Change type ‘year’ column integer natural representation. Add srppp_pests, table pesticide targets (“pests”) extracted years. Add parallel imports table srppp_products. Also, add column chNbr, holding registration number (e.g. “W-7610-1” “D-6918” example parallel import). Add data 2025 XML file dated 1 April 2025, published website 17 April 2025. Add function srppp_xml_product_use_not_authorized find products active authorisation nevertheless present source XML file. Update srppp_list derived data objects using srppp version 1.1.0. adds culture_tree attribute srppp_dm object list. Also, duplicate ingredient specifications product now removed. new table srppp_compositions added, one composition P-Number, opposed srppp_ingredients, unique compositions listed. functions pNbr composition added, making trivial find P-Numbers product names compositions P-Numbers.

title: version 1.0.0
text: Update srppp_list derived data objects using srppp version 1.0.1, storing risk mitigation measures integers instead character, adding reference parent cultures culture table, trimming leading trailing whitespace descriptions Add convenience function product_categories(), concatenating product categories specific P-Number specific year Add concatenated product categories srppp_products, taken latest year product contained

title: version 0.99.2
text: Use srppp version 0.99.2 read historic data. Thus, product information now tied P-Number, turned sales permissions (W-Numbers dashes) always identical product sections exception permission holder. Add earliest year appearance product list srppp_products, earliest latest year srppp_substances srppp_active_substances.

title: version 0.3.4
text: Add translations obligations protection environment (SPe 3) codes risk mitigation measures (distance surface waters biotopes, drift reduction runoff reduction points) Rename package ‘psmvhist’ ‘srppphist’ update data using version 0.3.4 ‘srppp’ package. 2011, now use XML file 31 October instead 18 October. 2020, now use XML file 20 January instead 16 January, corrections made later files. Add table substances years ‘srppp_substances’, table products years ‘srppp_products’, table active ingredient contents ‘srppp_ingredients’.

title: Version 0.3.3
text: ‘psmv_list’ object updated using psmv version 0.3.3, hope redundant information removed ingredients table.
